blueprint.name: Auto Ceiling Fan Controller
blueprint.description: This blueprint automatically controls a ceiling fan based on the temperature difference between the ceiling and the ambient temperature. Without an AC mode entity, it determines the rotation direction based on the season (northern hemisphere). It supports heating and cooling modes with configurable speed thresholds.
input.fan_entity.name: Fan to control
input.fan_entity.description: The ceiling fan entity to control with this automation.
input.temperature_sources.name: Temperature sources
input.temp_group.name: Temperature group (min_max)
input.temp_group.description: A min_max sensor group that provides max_value (ceiling) and min_value (ambient). If provided, this takes priority over the two separate sensors below.
input.temp_sensor_high.name: Ceiling temperature sensor
input.temp_sensor_high.description: Temperature sensor placed near the ceiling. Used only if no group is configured above.
input.temp_sensor_low.name: Ambient temperature sensor
input.temp_sensor_low.description: Ambient temperature sensor (room level). Used only if no group is configured above.
input.climate_control.name: AC mode control
input.ac_mode_selector.name: AC mode entity (optional)
input.ac_mode_selector.description: An input_select indicating the current AC mode (Heating / Cooling / Off). If not set, the rotation direction is determined automatically by season (northern hemisphere: November–March = reverse, April–October = forward).
input.ac_state_heating.name: Heating state value
input.ac_state_heating.description: The exact input_select value indicating heating mode. The fan rotates in reverse.
input.ac_state_cooling.name: Cooling state value
input.ac_state_cooling.description: The exact input_select value indicating cooling mode. The fan rotates forward.
input.ac_state_off.name: Off state value
input.ac_state_off.description: The exact input_select value indicating the system is off. The fan stops regardless of the temperature delta.
input.threshold_settings.name: Temperature thresholds
input.threshold_stop.name: Stop threshold
input.threshold_stop.description: The fan turns off when the temperature delta falls below this value.
input.threshold_start_normal.name: Normal start threshold
input.threshold_start_normal.description: The fan starts at medium speed when the delta exceeds this value (silent mode off).
input.threshold_start_silent.name: Silent start threshold
input.threshold_start_silent.description: The fan starts at medium speed when the delta exceeds this value (silent mode active).
input.threshold_high.name: High speed threshold
input.threshold_high.description: The fan runs at high speed when the delta exceeds this value.
input.speed_settings.name: Fan speeds
input.speed_low.name: Low speed
input.speed_low.description: Fan percentage used in the hysteresis zone (between stop and start thresholds).
input.speed_medium.name: Medium speed
input.speed_medium.description: Fan percentage used in normal running conditions.
input.speed_high.name: High speed
input.speed_high.description: Fan percentage used when the delta exceeds the high speed threshold.
input.silent_mode_section.name: Silent mode
input.silent_mode_entity.name: Silent mode entity
input.silent_mode_entity.description: An input_boolean or binary_sensor that enables silent mode (e.g. TV on). When active, the fan only starts when the delta exceeds the silent start threshold. Leave empty to disable.
